items.name_cn:
DIOR❤️TOUJOURS Handbag [White Small]
This Dior Toujours handbag debuted at the Spring/Summer 2023 show, featuring a unique casual and practical design. Crafted from white calfskin, it is detailed with oversized houndstooth stitching. The spacious interior features a compartment and a small pocket for neatly organizing daily essentials. It features a CD Lock letter D turn-lock closure with adjustable sides to elevate the style. The leather handle has adjustable details for easy hand carrying.
CD Lock and drawstring closure
D.I.O.R. charm
Removable inner pocket
Adjustable leather handle
Includes dust bag
Model: 2822
Dimensions: 23x15x15cm. 000690

items.name_cn:
Lunch Box Bag in Stock!!️
Hobostar Denim Series. I was inspired to get this bag; it reinterprets the classic letter pattern with irregular stonewash effects, giving the bag a fresh style. The gradient effect is unique and cool, and the denim print shows off a fashionable charm that looks both premium and visually striking. The extra-large capacity design fully meets daily travel needs, it is stylish, versatile, and full of vintage vibes.
Size: 28.5*10*14.5cm

items.name_cn:
Denim Blue in Stock!!️
Callisto hobo bag series. This summer must be a healing blue. The cute crescent bag shape, Denim Blue Oblique fabric, and matching calfskin leather are full of details. Zipper closure design, small and lightweight yet incredibly spacious. Paired with a circular charm featuring a star symbol and chain pearl decoration, it is full of exquisite details.
Size: 29*4*14cm

items.name_en: ❤️❤️Blue Denim 30 Montaigne East-West Chain Bag features an elegant design that elevates the style of the collection. Crafted from blue Denim Dior Oblique jacquard fabric, it reimagines the classic Dior pattern with an irregular stone-washed effect, showcasing modern charm. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Other details, such as the debossed 30 Montaigne logo on the back, highlight a clean style. It comes with a detachable chain shoulder strap with leather trim, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.

items.name_cn:
❤️Mist Grey
The latest Lady micro series, a bag that can't hold anything, only holds a cute little bag 😘, crafted from soft lambskin, featuring the iconic letter hardware buckle, exquisite bag shape 👏🏻, simple, stylish and versatile, small capacity, can only hold lipstick and car keys, also works as a card holder 🤗
size:12*10*5cm
